subject: Streamlining operations at Line Dental
body:
Hi Line Dental team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across dental, I'm seeing the same pattern — front desk staff buried in scheduling, insurance verification, and patient intake paperwork instead of focusing on patient experience.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes talking through what this could look like for Line Dental?

Best,
Brandon Rye

Hi Torstveit Medical Aesthetics team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across med spas and aesthetics, I'm seeing the same pattern — appointment booking, client follow-ups, and treatment tracking handled manually when most of it could run on autopilot.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes talking through what this could look like for Torstveit Medical Aesthetics?

Best,
Brandon Rye

Hi Jeff,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across property management, I'm seeing the same pattern — teams drowning in tenant requests, maintenance coordination, and lease tracking across spreadsheets and email threads.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes talking through what this could look like for Southern Sky Realty?

Best,
Brandon Rye

Hi Bowes In Home Care team,

I'm a Columbia MBA and former Citi investment banking VP who now helps growing businesses cut operational waste and streamline workflows. Before banking, I spent years in FP&A and systems implementation — including driving $18M in recurring cost reductions at FedEx.

Across senior care, I'm seeing the same pattern — coordinators spending hours on caregiver scheduling, compliance documentation, and family communication that should be automated.

I offer what I call an Operations Blueprint: a 60-minute deep dive where we map your current workflows, identify the highest-ROI automation opportunities, and outline exactly how to implement them — with a full written roadmap delivered within 48 hours.

Would it make sense to spend 15 minutes talking through what this could look like for Bowes In Home Care?

Best,
Brandon Rye
